mapLinks.label: Day 1–2 Map — Iceland — Reykjanes, Geysir & South Coast

sections.heading: Day 1 — Golden Circle + South Coast Waterfalls
items: Pick up Iceland car at KEF · depart ~10:30am
Drive 45 min → Kerið Crater — red volcanic walls, vivid aquamarine lake · walk the rim + descend to lake edge · 12:15pm arrive (~45 min · ISK 600)
Drive 15 min → Lunch in Selfoss — Kaffi Krús or Almar Bakari · 1:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 35 min → Geysir — Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · watch 2–3 eruptions and leave · 2:45pm (~45 min)
⚠️ Gullfoss optional (10 min from Geysir) — Iceland's most powerful two-tier waterfall · add 45 min if energy allows · 3:45pm
Drive 45 min south → Urriðafoss — Iceland's most voluminous waterfall · 2 min off Route 1 · ground trembles from the force · almost nobody here · 5:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 15 min → Seljalandsfoss — walk behind the falls · bring waterproofs! · 6:15pm (~1hr)
Gljúfrabúi — hidden canyon waterfall 5 min walk from Seljalandsfoss · most tour buses skip it · genuinely magical (~30 min)
Drive 20 min → Skógafoss — climb the 527 steps for the top view · evening light is spectacular · 8:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 15 min east → Reynisfjara black sand beach — basalt columns, Reynisdrangar sea stacks · stunning in evening light · (~25 min)
Drive 10 min → Vík village — red-roofed church viewpoint · quick stop (~15 min)
Drive 10 min east → Room in Skeidflot, Skeidflot 871 — check in ~9:30pm · hosted by Arnar · Airbnb ✅

sections.heading: Day 2 — South Coast Full Push
items: Leave Skeidflot 7:00am — already deep on the South Coast, 10km from Dyrhólaey
Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint over black sand coast and sea arch · puffins nesting on Lágey islet in June · head to the lower road for the arch · arrive before 8am · (~30 min)
Drive 45 min east → Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — 100m deep moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones Season 8 Episode 1 dragon flight location · ISK 1000 Parka fee · walk the full rim (~1.5hrs)
Lunch in Kirkjubæjarklaustur — 10 min from canyon · quick stop ~30 min

Drive 30 min east → Svínafellsjökull Glacier — 2km side road off Ring Road · 15–20 min walk to viewpoint · deep blue glacial ice + jagged black peaks · Game of Thrones S7 + Interstellar filming location · ⚠️ viewpoint only (rockfall risk advisory) · free · ~45 min total
Drive 1hr east → Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon — floating blue icebergs at the edge of Vatnajökull · walk the lagoon shore · seals basking on the ice · truly otherworldly · (~45 min)
Cross the road → Diamond Beach — ice diamonds scattered across jet-black volcanic sand · every piece unique · constantly changing with the tides · free · (~30 min)
Drive ~2hrs west back along Ring Road → BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík · check in ~5:00pm ✅
Evening 6:30pm: drive 20 min → Reykjanes Peninsula golden hour — Reykjanesviti lighthouse + Bridge Between Continents · 24hr June daylight · spectacular late light
Early night — 5:15am alarm tomorrow for KEF

tags.text: ⏰ Set alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — drive ~45 min to KEF
🐦 Puffins at Dyrhólaey — head to lower Lágey area · most active before 10am in June
💳 Parka app needed: Fjaðrárgljúfur ISK 1000
✓ Room in Skeidflot · Night 1 · Airbnb · $290.36
✓ BergOne · Night 2 · Booking.com · $263.98

summary.highlights: Kerið · Geysir · Seljalandsfoss · Skógafoss · Reynisfjara · Svínafellsjökull · Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon · Diamond Beach · Dyrhólaey

mapLinks.label: Day 3 Map — Fly → Lake Thun → Diemtigtal

items: Return Iceland car at KEF · board 7:20am FI568

Land ZRH 1:05pm · clear Non-Schengen → Schengen passport control · pick up Hertz rental car at Arrivals Hall desk · Conf. L5350959316 · Jeep Compass or similar · allow 60–90 min for immigration + car pickup
Depart ZRH ~2:30–3:00pm · drive south toward Bernese Oberland

Drive ~1hr → Lake Thun (Thunersee) viewpoint near Spiez — pull off on Route 6 for the classic Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau framed by turquoise lake · medieval Spiez Castle on the waterfront worth a quick 15 min stop · no entry needed for the exterior · first taste of the Bernese Oberland (~30 min)
Drive 45 min → Tiny House Diemtigtal · check in · arrive ~5:30–6:00pm ✅
Dinner locally or cook in the Tiny House kitchen · early night — big Day 4 tomorrow

Evening ~6:00pm: walk the Grimmimutz Discovery Trail from Oey — family-themed trail through the valley with illustrated markers telling the story of the forest dwarf Grimmimutz and the pepper witch · ~45–60 min · free · starts right at the village

Stroll through Diemtigtal village — traditional wooden chalets · Wakker Prize-winning intact villagescape · largest alpine farming valley in Switzerland · cowbells, wild roses, mountain backdrop · 20 min · free

tags.text: ✓ Tiny House im schönen Diemtigtal · Airbnb · $255.92 · Jun 22–23 · 1 night
🏷 At Hertz: confirm Swiss vignette (CHF 40) included · confirm cross-border approval for Italy + Slovenia · inspect car before leaving
💙 Blausee tickets: buy online at blausee.ch to skip queue · CHF 12 adult / CHF 6 child
⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills up fast in summer

summary.highlights: Fly KEF→ZRH · Hertz pickup · Lake Thun viewpoint · Spiez Castle · Grimmimutz Discovery Trail · Diemtigtal village stroll

days.title: Oeschinensee + Grindelwald First — Double Gondola Day
days.meta: Jun 23 · Diemtigtal → Kandersteg (Oeschinensee) → Grindelwald First → Diemtigtal

mapLinks.label: Day 4 Map — Oeschinensee + Grindelwald First — Double Gondola

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:00am · drive 20 min → Kandersteg
⭐ Oeschinensee gondola 8:30am slot — pre-booked timed entry · turquoise alpine lake at 1,578m enclosed by sheer 2,000m cliffs · ~CHF 35/adult · ⚠️ book slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com

🥾 Oeschinensee lake walk — 25 min down to shore from gondola station · panorama trail or direct path · rowing boats available · summer toboggan run at mountain station · ~1.5hrs at lake · gondola down by 10:30am
Drive ~1hr → Grindelwald · park at Firstbahn Talstation · arrive ~11:30am
⭐ Grindelwald Firstbahn gondola #238070 ✅ — ride to First (2,168m) · Eiger directly opposite · spectacular arrival on the ridge
⭐ First Cliff Walk — suspended steel & glass walkway bolted to the sheer cliff face · vertigo-inducing views over the valley · ~30 min · free with gondola ticket
Lunch — Restaurant First on the ridge (~1hr)
🥾 Bachalpsee hike — flat trail from First station to the iconic alpine lake · Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau reflected in the water · 5km return · ~1.5hrs
Gondola down · drive ~45 min back to Diemtigtal · arrive ~6:30pm
Dinner — Tiny House kitchen or Stärnä Beizli, Oey (~1hr)

tags.text: ⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills fast in summer
✅ Grindelwald First gondola #238070 · Jun 23 · 2 adults + 2 children
⏰ Oeschinensee 8:30am slot — book at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com if not already done

summary.highlights: Oeschinensee turquoise lake · Grindelwald First gondola ✅ · First Cliff Walk · Bachalpsee hike

days.title: Lauterbrunnen → Berchtesgaden
days.meta: Jun 24 · Lauterbrunnen → Staubbach Falls → Trümmelbach Falls → Berchtesgaden

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:30am · drive 45 min → Lauterbrunnen · park in village
⭐ Lauterbrunnen valley — 72 waterfalls · Staubbach Falls (300m freefall over the village · 15 min walk to base · free) · valley floor stroll (~1hr)
⭐ Trümmelbach Falls (optional) — glacial meltwater thundering through gorge inside the mountain · €12/adult · ~45 min · kids love it
Drive ~3hrs northeast → Berchtesgaden · check in · ⏳ hotel yet to book · no place decided
Dinner — Berchtesgaden (~1hr)

tags.text: 🏰 Ehrenberg + Highline179 combined ticket ~€18/adult · no booking needed · buy on site · opens 9am
🌉 Highline179: 406m suspension bridge · 113m above valley · connects Ehrenberg ruins to Fort Claudia · genuinely thrilling for kids
⚠️  — Neuschwanstein: book NOW at neuschwanstein.de if switching · June sells out months ahead · guided tour only ~€15/adult
✓ Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe · Conf. #6026325459 · $202

summary.highlights: Staubbach Falls · Lauterbrunnen valley · Trümmelbach Falls · drive to Berchtesgaden

days.title: Königssee + Eagle's Nest + Hintersee → Hallein
days.meta: Jun 25 · Berchtesgaden → Königssee boat → Eagle's Nest → Hintersee → Jenner (optional) → Hallein

mapLinks.label: Day 6 Map — Munich → Königssee → Eagle's Nest → Hintersee → Hallein

items: Leave Berchtesgaden area 7:00am · drive ~2hrs → Königssee dock, Schönau am Königssee · arrive ~9:00am
⭐ Königssee electric boat departs ~9:15am — ride straight to Salet (55 min · do NOT get off at St. Bartholomä yet)
🥾 Obersee walk — 15 min from Salet to pristine mountain lake · iconic half-submerged boathouse · the quietest corner of Berchtesgaden · ~45min
Board boat back to St. Bartholomä (20 min) · quick beer garden lunch at the historic hunting lodge (~45min)
Final boat back to Königssee Seelände (~35 min) · arrive ~12:30pm
Drive 10 min → Obersalzberg · park · walk to Dokumentation Obersalzberg WWII museum (~30min · €10/adult)

⭐ Eagle's Nest (Kehlsteinhaus) — bus from Obersalzberg · first afternoon bus ~1:00pm · elevator through the mountain · summit 1,834m · panoramic view over Berchtesgaden, Königssee and the Alps · ~2hrs
Drive 15 min → Hintersee + Zauberwald (Magic Forest) — crystal-clear turquoise lake · giant moss-covered boulders · quick 30min walk · free
Drive 35 min north → Hallein · check in Pension-Café-Konditorei Mikl ✅ · 2 Doktor-Albert-Eder-Straße · check-in 14:00–18:00
⭐ Hallein old town optional evening — 15 min walk from Pension · Keltenmuseum · Salzach riverside · 15min from Salzburg

tags.text: ⏰ Leave Berchtesgaden 7am · Königssee boat 9:15am · Eagle's Nest afternoon bus ~1pm · Berchtesgaden by 6pm
💰 Königssee boat ~€22 return · Eagle's Nest bus €3 return (from Obersalzberg car park) · Jenner cable car ~€25
⛵ Königssee boat — book at seenschifffahrt.de · reserve in advance for Jun 25
✅ Pension-Café-Konditorei Mikl, Berchtesgaden · confirmed · check-in 14:00–18:00

summary.highlights: Königssee electric boat · Obersee · Eagle's Nest 1,834m · Hintersee Zauberwald · Hallein

days.title: Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg + Hohensalzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt
days.meta: Jun 26 · Berchtesgaden → Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt

mapLinks.label: Day 7 Map — Hallein → Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt

items: Checkout Hallein by 8:00am — check-out 08:00–11:00 · drive 35 min west → Liechtensteinklamm, St. Johann im Pongau · arrive ~8:40am
⭐ Liechtensteinklamm Gorge — deepest gorge in the Alps · 444 stairs up + helix staircase · thundering waterfalls · narrow slot canyon · ~€8/adult · ~1.5hrs
Drive 45 min north → Salzburg · park Altstadtgarage B · arrive ~11:15am
⭐ Salzburg old town — Getreidegasse · Mozart's birthplace exterior · Residenzplatz · Dom cathedral · ~1hr
⭐ Hohensalzburg Fortress interior — funicular up · one of Europe's largest medieval fortresses · Fürstenzimmer state rooms · city panorama · ~1.5hrs · €16/adult
Drive 45 min east → Wolfgangsee (St. Gilgen) · arrive ~4:00pm
⭐ Wolfgangsee — turquoise lake · Schafberg mountain backdrop · lakefront promenade · coffee · 30min
Drive 30 min south → Hallstatt · arrive ~5:00pm · ⚠️ P1/P2 parking or Obertraun + ferry
⭐ Hallstatt golden hour lakefront — best light of the day · market square · lakeside walk · dinner
Drive 10 min south → Kaiserblick Goisern ✅ · key box at entrance · Night 1 of 2

tags.text: ⏰ Checkout Hallein 8am · Liechtensteinklamm opens 8am · arrive early before tour groups
💰 Liechtensteinklamm €8/adult · Hohensalzburg funicular + fortress €16/adult · Hallstatt parking €4/hr
🅿️ Hallstatt: P1 €4/hr · or park Obertraun + take ferry (5min drive + 10min ferry)

summary.highlights: Liechtensteinklamm gorge · Salzburg old town + Hohensalzburg Fortress · Wolfgangsee · Hallstatt golden hour

days.title: Hallstatt Full Day — Gosausee · Salt Mine · Skywalk · Beinhaus · Echern Valley · Dachstein 5 Fingers
days.meta: Jun 27 · Kaiserblick Goisern → Hallstatt (Salt Mine + Skywalk + Beinhaus + Gosausee + Echern Valley + Dachstein 5 Fingers) → back to Kaiserblick

mapLinks.label: Day 8 Map — Hallstatt Full Day — Gosausee · Salt Mine · Skywal

items: Already in Hallstatt — walk straight out of hotel · no travel time · village wakes slowly before 9am
Drive 20 min from Hallstatt → Gosausee (Gosau Lake) · turquoise lake with full Dachstein glacier wall reflected in still water · arrive ~7:30am

⭐ Gosaukammbahn cable car — ride up from the lake to ~1,650m · ~€28 return · aerial view of Dachstein glacier from above · Gosaukamm ridge · far fewer visitors than Dachstein Krippenstein · ~1.5hrs total including ridge walk
🥾 Gosaukamm ridge walk — from top station · dramatic limestone towers · glacier panorama · easy 45min walk along the ridge · return by cable car

⭐ Hallstatt Salt Mine (Salzwelten) — world's oldest salt mine · wooden mine slide · underground salt lake · ~1.5hrs · €35/adult · book online at salzwelten.at · first entry 9am sharp · arrive counter by 8:45am
⭐ Hallstatt Skywalk viewpoint — 20 min walk up from village · 360° panorama of Hallstatt and the lake far below · best morning light · completely free
⭐ Beinhaus (Bone Chapel) — over 1,200 painted skulls decorated with names, dates and flowers · unique in the world · 10 min walk from market square · small entry fee · eerie and deeply moving
⭐ Hallstatt village walk + lunch — lakefront promenade · Pfarrkirche church · market square · lakeside lunch (~1hr)

🥾 Echern Valley + Waldbachstrub Waterfall — trail starts directly behind the village · no drive · climb into the Dachstein foothills · Waldbachstrub Waterfall (30 min up · thundering cascade) · return (~1.5hrs total)
Drive 15 min → Dachstein Krippenstein cable car, Obertraun · arrive ~2:15pm · ⚠️ pre-book at dachstein.at

⭐ Dachstein 5 Fingers (2,109m) — five glass-floored arms extending over a 400m cliff face · Hallstatt visible far below · one of the most dramatic viewpoints in Austria · ~45 min · ⚠️ Giant Ice Cave closed until Jun 30 — skip ice cave on this visit · cable car down by 4:00pm

📌 Giant Ice Cave (Rieseneishöhle) — noted but closed until Jun 30 2026 · same cable car station as 5 Fingers · massive underground ice formations · guided tour ~1.5hrs · consider if itinerary allows a revisit · check dachstein.at before trip
Drive 15 min → Hallstatt lakefront golden hour — best evening light · dinner lakeside (~1hr)
2nd night Kaiserblick Goisern ✅ · already checked in · drive 10 min back from Hallstatt/Obertraun

tags.text: ⭐ Gosaukammbahn cable car ~€28 return · opens 9am · do this FIRST before salt mine — best morning light
⛏ Salt Mine — salzwelten.at · €35/adult · book in advance · first entry 9am · arrive by 10:30am after cable car
⛰ Dachstein 5 Fingers — pre-book at dachstein.at · last ascent ~5pm · arrive Obertraun by 2:15pm
⏰ Gosausee 7:30am → cable car → Salt Mine 10:30am → Skywalk → Dachstein 2:15pm

summary.highlights: Gosausee + Gosaukammbahn cable car · Dachstein glacier from above · Salt Mine · Skywalk · Beinhaus · Echern Valley · Dachstein 5 Fingers

days.title: Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Sillian · Dolomites Gateway
days.meta: Jun 28 · Bad Goisern → Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Lienz → Sillian, Austria

mapLinks.label: Day 9 Map — Bad Goisern → Grossglockner → Lienz → Sillian

items: Checkout Kaiserblick Goisern by 8:30am — check-out 08:00–10:00
Drive 1hr 15min south → Grossglockner Hochalpenstraße entrance at Bruck an der Glocknerstraße · toll €37/car · opens 5am daily

⭐ Grossglockner High Alpine Road — 48km of switchbacks to 2,504m · Austria's highest paved road · Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe viewpoint (2,369m) · direct view of the Grossglockner 3,798m · Pasterze Glacier walk · one of the world's great scenic drives
⭐ Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe — stop here for the glacier view · Pasterze Glacier platform · ibex sometimes visible on the rocks · ~45min
Continue south over the pass → Heiligenblut · stunning Baroque church against the mountains · quick stop
Drive 1hr south → Lienz · gateway to East Tyrol · optional lunch stop (~45min)
Drive 1hr east → Sillian, East Tyrol, Austria 🇦🇹 · arrive ~3:30pm
Check in Hotel Schwarzer Adler Sillian · ✅ Confirmed · $115 / €99.40 · check-in 16:00–21:00 · Sillian 12, 9920 Sillian
⭐ Optional: drive 25min → Lago di Braies afternoon preview — see the lake before the sunrise crowds tomorrow · Località Braies di Sotto 1, 39030 Braies (Prags) · GPS 46.6944°N 12.0853°E
Dinner in Sillian · in bed by 9pm · alarm 5:00am tomorrow · Braies sunrise

tags.text: 💰 Grossglockner toll €37/car · road opens 5am · allow 3hrs for the full alpine road section
⏰ Leave Bad Goisern 8:30am · Grossglockner entrance ~9:45am · Sillian by 3:30pm · alarm 5am tomorrow
⚠️ Check road status at grossglockner.at — occasional closures due to snow/weather in June
✅ Hotel Schwarzer Adler Sillian · Confirmed · $115 · check-in 16:00–21:00

summary.highlights: Grossglockner High Alpine Road 2,504m · Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe · Pasterze Glacier · Heiligenblut · Lienz · Sillian arrival · optional Braies preview

days.title: East Dolomites — Braies Sunrise + Cadini + Prato Piazza + Cortina + Falzarego + Gardena → Siusi
days.meta: Jun 29 · Sillian → Braies sunrise → Cadini di Misurina → Prato Piazza → Cortina d'Ampezzo → Falzarego Pass → Gardena Pass → Siusi

mapLinks.label: Day 10 Map — Sillian → Braies → Cadini → Prato Piazza → Cortina → Falzarego → Gardena → Siusi

items: 5:00am alarm · drive 25 min → Lago di Braies · arrive 5:30am · gate opens 7:30am but you're already inside
⭐ Lago di Braies sunrise — emerald mirror lake · iconic boathouse · Dolomite peaks reflected in still water · most beautiful lake in Italy
🥾 Braies lake circuit — 3.5km · flat · ~1hr · pure silence · nobody there · Croda del Becco (2,810m) towers directly above — admire it from the shore, not the summit
Drive 20 min → Lago di Misurina · quick stop on the way · turquoise lake mirroring the Tre Cime · the “pearl of the Dolomites” · photos from the shore · 10 min
⭐ Lago di Misurina — calm emerald waters · Sorapis massif reflection · one of the most photographed lakes in the Dolomites · no hiking needed
Drive 10 min → Rifugio Auronzo via toll road · €30 · arrive ~8:30am · park early before crowds

⭐ Cadini di Misurina viewpoint — Trail 117 — 20 min hike from Rifugio Auronzo · follow signs for path 117/Fonda Savio heading east · rocky ridgeline traverse · famous “ski jump” viewpoint of the spires · Lord of the Rings scenery · jaw-dropping · do this FIRST while legs are fresh · AllTrails ↗
🥾 Trail 117 — Cadini hike — 4–5 km round trip · 40–45 min each way · rocky + narrow exposed final section · moderate difficulty · completely worth it · best view of the entire trip

🥾 Short Tre Cime loop — Forcella Lavaredo viewpoint — walk counterclockwise from Rifugio Auronzo · ~0.5–1 mile · 20–25 min to Forcella Lavaredo (2,454m) · the highest point on the full circuit · iconic front-on view of all three peaks · turn back here · no need for the full 10km loop
⭐ Forcella Lavaredo — best single viewpoint in the entire Dolomites · all three Cime framed perfectly · ~40–50 min round trip from car park
Drive back 30 min → Prato Piazza plateau · park at Rifugio Prato Piazza · arrive ~11:00am
⭐ Prato Piazza — open alpine plateau · Tre Cime looming directly ahead · best free non-technical Dolomites viewpoint · coffee at the Rifugio
🥾 Prato Piazza easy walk — 1hr loop · flat · free · morning light on Tre Cime
Lunch at Rifugio Prato Piazza (~1hr) · cash
Drive 45 min west → Cortina d’Ampezzo · Corso Italia piazza · Tofane peaks framing the town · espresso stop · ~45 min
⭐ Cortina d’Ampezzo — the queen of the Dolomites · elegant mountain town · a perfect coffee break after a big morning
Drive 20 min west → Passo Falzarego (2,105m) · dramatic rock formations · Lagazuoi massif · quick photo stop · 15 min
Continue via Passo Gardena (2,121m) · SS243 · Sella Massif · Cir Peaks · one of the world’s most beautiful mountain passes · photo stop
Drive 45 min → Siusi allo Sciliar · check in hotel · arrive ~5:00pm · ⏳ yet to book · near cable car station
⭐ Collalbo / Renon plateau evening — Schlern massif views · village walk · rest · Seceda and Val di Funes tomorrow · ~50min drive to Ortisei

tags.text: ⏰ 5am alarm · Braies 25min · arrive before gate (7:30am) · Misurina stop ~8am · Auronzo by 8:30am · Cadini + Tre Cime by 10:30am · Prato Piazza by 11am
💰 Tre Cime toll road €30/car · Cadini viewpoint free · Prato Piazza free
⭐ Croda del Becco viewed from Braies shore — 2,810m towers directly above · the summit hike is 6-8hrs, do not attempt with the rest of this day
⏳ Book Kaiserau 1907 Collalbo Jun 29–Jul 1 (2 nights) · near cable car · book now — peak season

summary.highlights: Braies sunrise · Lago di Misurina · Trail 117 Cadini viewpoint · Tre Cime Forcella Lavaredo · Prato Piazza · Cortina · Falzarego · Gardena · Collalbo

days.title: West Dolomites — Seceda + Val di Funes + Lagazuoi
days.meta: Jun 30 · Collalbo → Ortisei (Seceda) → Val di Funes → Passo Falzarego (Lagazuoi) → back to Collalbo

items: Leave Collalbo 7:30am · drive 20 min → Ortisei, Val Gardena · park at Parkgarage Seceda · ⚠️ pre-book Seceda timed slots at seceda.it
⭐ Seceda cable car (Ortisei → 2,519m) · 15-min ride · €59/adult · Fermeda Towers + Sassolungo panorama · most iconic jagged-peak view in the entire Dolomites
🥾 Forcella Pana ridgeline walk — 10 min from top station · Fermeda Towers close-up · Sassolungo panorama · ~1hr · easy
Lunch at Rifugio Firenze on the Seceda ridge (~1hr) · cable car back down · depart Ortisei ~1:00pm
Drive 30 min → Val di Funes (Santa Maddalena) · park in village · afternoon light is perfect for this shot
⭐ Santa Maddalena Church viewpoint — most photographed scene in South Tyrol · stone church in emerald meadow + jagged Odle peaks · Panoramaweg walk (~1hr return · free)
Drive 1hr west via SS242 → Passo Falzarego · scenic route through Corvara · arrive by 4:00pm
⭐ Lagazuoi cable car (2,752m) — arrive Passo Falzarego by 4:00pm · Rifugio Lagazuoi · WWI tunnel galleries (helmet + headlamp ~€20) · panorama over 8 Dolomite groups · last cable car ~5:30pm
Drive 1hr 20min → Siusi · arrive ~7:30pm · dinner · Night 2

mapLinks.label: Day 11 Map — Collalbo → Seceda → Val di Funes → Lagazuoi → Collalbo

tags.text: ⚠️ Pre-book Seceda timed slots at seceda.it · €59/adult · 2026 requires advance booking
⏰ Arrive Lagazuoi by 4pm · last cable car down 5:30pm · comfortable with Siusi base
💰 Passo Gardena SS243 — do NOT take the highway · 25min extra · obligatory

summary.highlights: Seceda cable car 2,519m · Forcella Pana ridgeline · Santa Maddalena viewpoint · Lagazuoi 2,752m WWI galleries

days.title: Full Day Collalbo → Finkenberg
days.meta: Jul 1 · Collalbo → Alpe di Collalbo full morning → drive to Finkenberg · sleep Finkenberg

items: Walk 5 min to Collalbo cable car station · ride up to Alpe di Collalbo plateau (1,850m) · ~€20 return · opens 8:00am
⭐ Alpe di Collalbo (Seiser Alm) — Europe's largest high alpine meadow · Sassolungo + Sassopiatto towering above · Sciliar/Schlern massif · wildflowers in July
🥾 Bullaccia plateau loop — 2hr moderate walk · 360° panorama of the entire Dolomites from the meadow · Rifugio Bullaccia coffee stop
⭐ Rifugio Zallinger lunch — most scenic rifugio on the plateau · Sassolungo right behind the terrace · Kaiserschmarrn · cash · ~1hr
🥾 Schlern massif approach (optional) — walk toward the dramatic flat-topped Schlern · Rifugio Bolzano views · ~1hr return
⭐ Optional: e-bikes on the plateau — cover more ground · available at Compatsch top station · reserve in advance
Cable car back down by 12:30pm · checkout Collalbo hotel · drive 1hr 30min → Finkenberg via Bressanone → Brenner
Arrive Finkenberg ~2:30pm · check in hotel · walk Hauptstraße · Tyrolean dinner · early night — Olpererhütte hike tomorrow

tags.text: ⭐ Cable car 5min walk from hotel · opens 8am · back down by 12:30pm latest
🚲 E-bikes at Compatsch top station · reserve in advance · ideal for kids
⏳ Book Finkenberg hotel Jul 1–2 · Hotel Strass / Hotel Elisabeth / Gasthof

summary.highlights: Alpe di Siusi full morning · Bullaccia plateau loop · Rifugio Zallinger · optional Schlern · drive to Finkenberg

days.title: Olpererhütte + Kebema → Achensee → Swarovski → Bichlbach
days.meta: Jul 2 · Finkenberg → Schlegeis → Olpererhütte → Achensee → Swarovski → Bichlbach

mapLinks.label: Day 13 Map — Finkenberg → Schlegeis → Achensee → Swarovski → Bichlbach

items: Leave Finkenberg 8:00am · drive 30 min → Schlegeis reservoir · ⚠️ park before 9am
⭐ Olpererhütte hike (Trail 502) — 3km · 600m elevation gain · ~1.5–2hrs up · rocky alpine ascent · Olperer glacier face above · Schlegeis turquoise far below
⭐ Kebema Suspension Bridge (Olperer Panoramabrücke) — 3–4 min past the hut · floats in mid-air above the glacier valley · one of the most dramatic viewpoints in the Alps
Lunch at Olpererhütte — Kaiserschmarrn · cash only · ~1hr · refill water at hut spring
Descent ~1hr · back at car ~2:30pm · drive 45 min → Achensee

⭐ Achensee — Austria's largest mountain lake · electric turquoise water · dramatic cliffs · Pertisau village · historic steam boat trip (Achenseebahn/Achensee Schifffahrt) · ~1hr on the water · completely different feel after the Dolomites
Drive 40 min → Swarovski Crystal Worlds (Kristallwelten), Wattens · arrive ~5:30pm · open until 7pm
⭐ Swarovski Crystal Worlds — giant's garden · 17 crystal chambers underground · largest crystal in the world · kids love the magic mirrors · ~€22/adult · ~€12/child · ~1hr
Drive 45 min west → Bichlbach · arrive ~7:30pm · check in Landhaus Bichlbach · ✅ Confirmed · early night · Seebensee tomorrow

tags.text: ⏰ Leave Mayrhofen 8am · Schlegeis before 9am · back at car 2:30pm · keeps afternoon schedule
💰 Schlegeis toll €17 cash · Olpererhütte cash only · Swarovski ~€22/adult €12/child · Nordkette ~€37 return
⭐ Nordkette: Hungerburgbahn from Congress station · last cable car up ~10:30pm · judge energy on the day — optional
⛵ Achensee boat — achensee.com · ~€15/adult · check schedule
⏳ Book Innsbruck hotel Jul 2–3 · Hotel Weisses Kreuz / Goldener Adler / Penz Hotel

summary.highlights: Olpererhütte 600m hike · Kebema bridge · Achensee boat · Swarovski Crystal Worlds · Innsbruck Golden Roof · optional Nordkette 2,334m golden hour

days.title: Seebensee + Drachensee Dragon Lake → Bichlbach Night 2
days.meta: Jul 3 · Bichlbach → Ehrwald → Seebensee → Drachensee → back to Bichlbach

mapLinks.label: Day 14 Map — Bichlbach → Seebensee → Drachensee → Bichlbach

items: Leave Bichlbach 8:30am · drive 5 min → Ehrwald · park at Ehrwalder Almbahn valley station · arrive ~8:35am
⭐ Ehrwalder Almbahn cable car up to mountain station · ~€21.50 return · Zugspitze massif looms directly above · 10 min ride
⭐ Seebensee — easy 45min gravel path from top station · turquoise glacial lake at 1,657m · Zugspitze reflected in the water · wildflower meadows · bench at the shore
🥾 Drachensee + Coburger Hütte — steep 30–45min climb (260m) from Seebensee · Dragon Lake of dark emerald colour · dramatic boulder-strewn landscape · Coburger Hütte refuge at the top
Lunch at Coburger Hütte — Kaiserschmarrn · Tiroler Gröstl · cash only · glacier and valley views · ~1hr
Descent ~1.5hrs · back at Ehrwald valley by 2:30pm
Drive 5 min → Bichlbach · back at Landhaus by 3:00pm · relax · pack bags · early dinner · alarm 7:00am tomorrow · Neuschwanstein + Rhine Falls + ZRH

tags.text: ⏰ Leave Innsbruck 8:30am · Ehrwald 9:30am · back at valley 2:30pm · Bregenz by 4:30pm
💰 Ehrwalder Almbahn ~€21.50 return · Coburger Hütte cash only
🏊 Strandbad Bregenz — swimming in Lake Constance · €5 entry · open until 8pm in July
⏳ Book Bregenz hotel Jul 3–4 · Hotel Weißes Kreuz / Messmer Boutique · near Bodensee

summary.highlights: Ehrwalder Almbahn · Seebensee glacier lake 1,657m · Drachensee Dragon Lake · Coburger Huette · back to Bichlbach

days.title: Bichlbach → Neuschwanstein → Ebenalp & Aescher Cliff → ZRH
days.meta: Jul 4 · Bichlbach → Neuschwanstein → Ebenalp/Wasserauen → (Rhine Falls optional) → ZRH Airport

mapLinks.label: Day 15 Map — Bichlbach → Neuschwanstein → Ebenalp → ZRH

items: Checkout Landhaus Bichlbach by 8:00am · check-out 08:00–10:00
Drive 45 min → Neuschwanstein Castle, Schwangau 🇩🇪 · arrive ~8:45am · ⚠️ pre-book 9:30am entry at tickets.hohenschwangau.de
⭐ Neuschwanstein Castle — King Ludwig II fairy-tale castle · most visited castle in Germany · interior tour ~35min · €15/adult · €13/child
⭐ Marienbruecke (Mary's Bridge) — 10min walk above castle · classic postcard view of Neuschwanstein framed by gorge + Alps · must do
Depart Neuschwanstein 11:30am · drive 1hr 30min southeast → Wasserauen, Appenzell 🇨🇭 · park at Schwendetalstrasse 82 · arrive ~1:00pm
⭐ Ebenalp cable car — Wasserauen → Ebenalp (1,590m) · 6 min ride · CHF 31/adult · CHF 12/child (6–16) · runs every 15 min · views of Alpstein massif + Lake Constance

🥾 Wildkirchli caves → Aescher cliff restaurant — 25 min walk down from cable car top station · path through prehistoric Neanderthal caves · old hermit chapel · wooden walkway built into the cliff face

⭐ Berggasthaus Aescher — iconic restaurant wedged into a 100m vertical cliff since 1860 · featured on National Geographic cover · Appenzeller cheese dishes · no reservations · first come first served · ~1hr
Walk back up to Ebenalp top station (~25 min) · cable car down · depart Wasserauen 3:00pm
➕ Optional: Rhine Falls — drive 45 min north → Rheinfall, Neuhausen am Rheinfall · Europe’s largest waterfall · boat to centre rock ~€7 · adds 1hr total · skip if tired
Drive 1hr 15min → ZRH Airport · return Hertz car (Conf. L5350959316) · arrive ~4:15pm (or ~5:15pm if Rhine Falls)
Check in Airport Hotel Zurich · ✅ Confirmed · Lindbergh-Platz 1, Glattbrugg · pack carefully · charge all devices · early dinner
⚠️ FI571 departs ZRH 7:55am → KEF → MCO 8:50pm · check in by 6:00am · alarm 5:00am

tags.text: ⏰ Alarm 7:00am · Neuschwanstein 8:45am (pre-book 9:30am entry) · Ebenalp 1:00pm · depart 3:00pm · ZRH ~4:15pm

⚠️ Aescher restaurant is first-come-first-served · no reservations · can get very busy on weekends · arrive by 1:30pm for best chance
⚠️ Alarm 5:00am Jul 5 · FI571 departs 7:55am · check in by 6:00am

accommodationBreakdown.property: Escape by Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe 🇩🇪 · Night 4

cash.for: Hut lunches, Rhine Falls boat, laundromat, Nordkette
Lagazuoi, Tre Cime shuttle, Cinque Torri

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss (walk behind the falls)
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks
Grossglockner toll €46.50/car — pack warm layers at 2,504m even in summer
Tre Cime: always take Misurina shuttle (€10), fills by 9am
Nordkette Innsbruck: weather-dependent — go first before old town
ETIAS: currently projected Q4 2026 — verify at europa.eu 30 days before departure (May 20). If launched early, each traveller needs online authorisation (~€7–20)
Austrian digital vignette — buy at asfinag.at by June 6 (18-day waiting period before Jun 24 entry)
Travel insurance: Schengen requires minimum €30,000 medical coverage per person — carry printed proof from your provider
Download offline maps before leaving home (Google Maps or maps.me) for all 7 countries — signal is patchy in the Dolomites and Julian Alps
Pack detergent sheets (lightweight, TSA-safe) for 4 laundry stops — many European apartment washers don't provide free soap
Zurich Airport hotel still needed (Jul 4–5). Radisson Blu ZRH is 3–7 min walk to check-in counters via indoor terminal connection. Worth the extra $50 vs a 4:30am shuttle.
Use the HOMEBOUND (Bad Goisern) and Das Auss.Zeit (Außervillgraten) kitchens for dinners — a single restaurant dinner in Switzerland for 4 easily hits $180
Liechtenstein passport stamp CHF 3 / €3.30 at Vaduz tourist office — worth every cent!
